zh.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne是Lord Ricardus Woodborne的兒子，於1475年出生在英國薩默塞特。他至少有1個兒子。他去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne是Lord Ricardus Woodborne的儿子，于1475年出生在英国薩默塞特。他至少有1个儿子。他去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Woodborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Woodburn
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Woodburn in Corsenside (Northumberland), Woodburn (Ayrshire, Kincardineshire, Midlothian), or Woodburn in Oakford (Devon). The placenames all derive from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + burna ‘spring, stream’, i.e. a stream flowing through a wood.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne was born in 1475, in Somerset, England as the son of Lord Ricardus Woodborne. He had at least 1 son. He died in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne est né en 1475, à Somerset, Angleterre, fils de Lord Ricardus Woodborne. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne wurde 1475 in Somerset, England, als Sohn von Lord Ricardus Woodborne geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne è nato il nel 1475 nel Somerset, England come figlio di Lord Ricardus Woodborne. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborneは1475年にイギリスソメルセトでLord Ricardus Woodborneの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne(은)는 1475년 영국 서머세트에서 Lord Ricardus Woodborne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne nasceu em 1475, em Somerset, Inglaterra filho de Lord Ricardus Woodborne. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne родился в 1475 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. Его отца звали Lord Ricardus Woodborne. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Woodborne nació en 1475, en Somerset, Inglaterra como hijo de Lord Ricardus Woodborne. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
